text: Hi, how's it going?
It's going well.
Definitely can't figure out the answers to some of these questions, but that's why we're meeting as a team.
Like what questions?
Like the laptop thing?
I mean, it's just hard to even like simplify it to a question, but I mean, the question is like, everybody wants to work with us.
We can only do two a week.
What is the solution for the excess demand?
You know, and there's a lot that goes into that, but I think I'm prepared to like go through it in a way that's efficient and organized.
It's just like a bigger question than, I think you realize it's a big question, but like, I don't, it's a tricky problem to tell you the truth.
Isn't it very different than your past experience?
The complete opposite, you know, you're working your butt off to close deals to hit quotes.
You're trying to slow it down.
This is like, you take one call and they're like, where do I sign?
I know, which is kind of scary because it, like, they buy so fast.
I'm worried they'll also, like, turn it off so fast, you know?
Yeah, I wish the strategy sprints were this easy, the execution of it on the delivery team.
I know, right?
Yeah.

Because, I mean, part of what makes it hard is a logo that, like, Marcel might say as a target that we absolutely want to close, we'll have a long procurement process, and then I'll take a call with, like, a Series A company that we'll hear about our four to six week backlog and we'll, like, want to do everything in their power to start with us.
And so, it's, like, navigating that, I struggle.
It's good, but, like, what do I, you know, like, if I take, if I give that, you know, Series A company.

After one call, one of our two kickoffs, then what do I do with the Navon or the Redis that by the time they sign, their kickoff date is like a month and a half later than what they want it to be, you know?

mean, Bridget probably has better thoughts, but if they're like a big logo and we had a good relationship with them, would make an exception and do three that week, three kickoffs.
